title: Clean up a messy email
drDigitalIntro: Here's your big Unit 2 test! You'll get a poorly written email and, using the keyboard only, you'll select text, copy a sentence, paste it elsewhere, delete extra words, capitalize names, add punctuation, move around with Tab, and submit. It brings together every skill from this unit.
drDigitalSuccess: Outstanding — you used the whole keyboard toolkit to clean that up!
drDigitalHint: This activity is coming soon — click Continue for now.
